headline: AWS Outage Tests Investor Confidence In Amazon Reliability And Valuation
summary: AWS experienced a data center outage in its North Virginia facility, linked to temperature and power issues. The disruption affected multiple cloud customers, including major platforms such as Coinbase. The incident highlights operational and reputational risk tied to reliance on Amazon Web Services. For Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN), the outage comes at a time when AWS is a central part of the story investors focus on. The stock trades at $271.17, with a 1 year return of 41.2% and a 3 year...

headline: Iran May Have Found a New Way to Threaten Trump’s Economy — And It’s Not Oil
summary: The stock market has spent much of 2026 acting like geopolitical risk is just background noise. The S&P 500 keeps pushing toward record highs, AI spending remains red hot, and investors have largely shrugged off the widening conflict involving Iran.
